user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable the Acumatica Integration Module by selecting Yes, so that HRMS can integrate with Acumatica.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Integrations Setup screen; When I select Yes for "Do you want to enable the Acumatica Integration Module?"; Then the integration option is set to enabled

user_story: As a System admin, I want to disable the Acumatica Integration Module by selecting No, so that the integration is turned off when not needed.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Integrations Setup screen; When I select No for "Do you want to enable the Acumatica Integration Module?"; Then the integration option is set to disabled

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save the Acumatica integration configuration, so that my selection is persisted.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen Yes or No on the Setup screen; When I click Save; Then the configuration is saved and confirmed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to cancel changes to the integration setup, so that I can discard modifications without saving.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have changed the Acumatica integration option; When I click Cancel; Then my changes are discarded and the original setting is retained

user_story: As a System admin, I want to see a prompt to configure Acumatica Integration when it is not configured, so that I know the integration still needs setup.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Acumatica Integration is not yet configured; When I open the Setup screen; Then a "Please configure Acumatica Integration" message is displayed
